data.title: U.S. Chip Stocks See Pre-Market Gains
data.description: U.S. chip stocks experienced a rise in pre-market trading. According to ChainCatcher, Nvidia saw an increase of 1.7%, AMD rose by 1.4%, Intel climbed 4.6%, Advanced Micro Devices gained 1.9%, Micron Technology went up by 4.4%, and Broadcom increased by 1.5%.

data.title: Vitalik Discusses Multisig Wallet Address Confirmation on X Platform
data.description:
Vitalik recently shared insights on the X platform regarding the confirmation of multisig wallet signer addresses without the Safe application installed on his mobile device. According to Odaily, he utilized Etherscan to locate the address and employed the 'read contract' feature to obtain the necessary information directly. Vitalik emphasized that if wallets or applications remain open-source and pass a 'walkaway test,' users can enjoy a better experience. In scenarios where the Safe website is not directly usable, providing alternative solutions can be beneficial for users.

Due to privacy protection needs, these workflows may eventually change. An equivalent privacy-friendly approach involves users saving a 'view key' containing additional private information. Block explorers can support this feature by placing private information in the URL's tag section, ensuring it remains within the application client. However, considering the risks associated with users pasting keys in URLs or web pages, more operations will ultimately need to be completed directly through the wallet.

data.title: Vitalik: Open-source wallet and contract reading functions can improve the user experience, such as viewing addresses in multisignature wallets.
data.description: Vitalik posted on the X platform that this morning, without the Safe app installed on his mobile device, he needed to verify the signer's address of a multisignature wallet. He obtained the necessary information directly by searching for the address on Etherscan and using the "Read Contract" function. Users will have a better experience if the wallet or application remains open source and passes the "walkaway test." Providing alternatives for users in common scenarios where the Safe website is not directly accessible can be helpful. Due to privacy concerns, this workflow may eventually change—an equivalent privacy-friendly solution is for users to save a "view key" containing additional private information. Block explorers can support this feature by including the private information in the URL's tag section, keeping it on the application client. However, considering the risks of users pasting keys into URLs or web pages, ultimately, more operations will still need to be completed directly through the wallet.

data.title: Dollar Index and USD/CHF Experience Notable Gains
data.description: The Dollar Index (DXY) has seen a significant increase of 0.5% today, currently standing at 96.24. According to ChainCatcher, the USD/CHF pair has also experienced a notable rise of 1%, with the current rate at 0.7691.

data.title: SK Chairman's Son-in-Law Establishes Crypto Investment Firm Hedron
data.description: Yoon Do-yeon, the son-in-law of SK Chairman Chey Tae-won, has initiated a new venture in the cryptocurrency sector with the establishment of Hedron, a crypto investment firm. According to NS3.AI, Hedron is registered in Singapore but operates primarily out of South Korea, concentrating on technology development and virtual asset investments. The firm boasts a team of seasoned professionals, including a former Chief Investment Officer from Uprise and a Head of Development, indicating a strong foundation in the industry.

data.title: Ripple launches Ripple Treasury, a corporate finance platform.
data.description: Ripple has launched Ripple Treasury, its enterprise finance platform, combining GTreasury's enterprise software with Ripple's blockchain infrastructure. The new platform aims to address frictions in enterprise finance operations, including settlement delays, limited visibility into cross-border payments, and fragmented systems for reconciling traditional cash with digital assets. This launch marks Ripple's first major product integration since its $1 billion acquisition of Chicago-based GTreasury last October. At the time, GTreasury CEO Renaat Ver Eecke called the deal a "watershed moment" in the treasury management space. (The Block)

data.title: ANAP Holdings holds 1,417 BTC, currently ranking 45th in Bitcoin holdings.
data.description: BitcoinTreasuries.NET reported on the X platform that ANAP Holdings (3139.T), a Japanese listed company, increased its holdings by 70.44 Bitcoins. The company now holds a total of 1417.03 BTC, ranking 45th in Bitcoin holdings.

data.title: An address withdrew 45 million USDC from Binance and used it to buy HYPE.
data.description: According to Lookonchain, a newly created address (0x9D26...1BfF) withdrew 45 million USDC from Binance and transferred it to Hyperliquid to buy HYPE. Currently, this address has purchased 289,120 HYPE tokens, worth $9.77 million, and the purchase is still ongoing.

data.title: Alibaba Cloud Launches Comprehensive Moltbot Cloud Service
data.description: Alibaba Cloud has introduced a full suite of Moltbot cloud services, previously known as Clawdbot. According to ChainCatcher, users can quickly activate Moltbot on Alibaba Cloud's lightweight application servers or Wuying Cloud computers. The service allows for on-demand access to over a hundred models from Alibaba Cloud's Qianwen series. This solution supports iMessage applications and enables DingTalk message interactions through Alibaba Cloud's Computing Nest.

data.title: Binance Founder Responds to Criticism Over 'Buy and Hold' Strategy
data.description: PANews posted on X (formerly Twitter). Binance founder Zhao Changpeng has addressed recent criticisms on social media regarding his 'buy and hold' investment strategy. Zhao noted that there have been organized attacks centered around this topic, with numerous unfamiliar accounts posting similar content simultaneously.

data.title: Lagrange and Camp Network Collaborate on AI Intellectual Property Encryption
data.description: Lagrange has announced a partnership with Camp Network to enhance encryption verification for AI-generated intellectual property. According to Foresight News, the collaboration aims to integrate source verification, computable validation, and on-chain settlement into a unified infrastructure. This initiative focuses on supporting creators, AI agents, and applications.

data.title: Gold broke through four key levels this week, with spot gold reaching $5,300.
data.description: Spot gold prices have been rising steadily, breaking through $5,300 per ounce for the first time. This week, it has broken through four multiples of $100, accumulating a gain of over $300. (Gold10)

data.title: Vitalik Buterin Highlights Benefits of Open Source Applications
data.description:
Vitalik Buterin recently discussed the advantages of open-source applications in a post. According to Foresight News, Buterin shared his experience of needing to verify the signers of his multi-signature address this morning. Without the Safe app installed on his phone, he was able to retrieve the necessary information by using the 'Read Contract' feature on Etherscan.

Buterin emphasized that the additional user experience benefits provided by open-source applications or wallets can be unexpectedly helpful, surpassing the capabilities of traditional websites. He further noted that privacy concerns might eventually limit this workflow.

To achieve a privacy-focused equivalent workflow, Buterin suggested that users could save a 'view key,' an extended version of their address containing additional privacy information. Block explorers could support this by placing privacy information in the hash tag section of the URL, keeping it client-side. However, he acknowledged the risk of encouraging users to paste any type of secret information into URLs or web pages. Ultimately, he stressed the need for wallets to perform more operations directly.

data.title: BlockSec releases analysis of major closed-source contract vulnerabilities: SwapNet and Aperture Finance suffer $17 million loss due to insufficient input validation.
data.description: BlockSec released an analysis of a major closed-source contract vulnerability, detecting a series of suspicious transactions targeting SwapNet and Aperture Finance contracts deployed on Ethereum, Arbitrum, Base, and BSC, resulting in total losses exceeding $17 million. Fundamentally, both incidents stemmed from a simple vulnerability: the victim contracts suffered from insufficient input validation, leading to arbitrary call vulnerabilities. Attackers could exploit this vulnerability to abuse existing token authorization, thereby using transferFrom to steal assets. While the SwapNet and Aperture Finance incidents affected different protocols and blockchains, the underlying problem remains uncomplicated: user-controlled underlying calls and insufficient input validation within contracts holding token authorization.

data.title: U.S. gold futures rose more than 4%, hitting a record high of $5,288 per ounce.
data.description: U.S. gold futures rose more than 4%, hitting a record high of $5,288 per ounce. (Jinshi)

data.title: A whale deposited $36.15 million into Hyperliquid and purchased 277,100 HYPE tokens.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a newly created address (0x9D2) deposited another $36.15 million into Hyperliquid, bringing the total deposits to $45 million. This whale has now purchased 277,100 HYPE tokens, worth $9.478 million.

data.title: Gold Futures Surpass $5,300 per Ounce for the First Time
data.description: Gold futures have reached an unprecedented level, surpassing $5,300 per ounce for the first time in history. The Kobeissi Letter posted on X, highlighting that this marks a significant increase of 21% this month. This surge in gold prices reflects ongoing market dynamics and investor sentiment. The rise in gold futures is being closely watched by market analysts and investors, as it may indicate broader economic trends and potential shifts in investment strategies. The increase comes amid various global economic factors influencing commodity markets. As gold continues to climb, stakeholders are evaluating the implications for both short-term and long-term financial planning.

data.title: South Korea Delays Decision on OTC Security Token Exchange Licensing
data.description: South Korea's Financial Services Commission (FSC) has postponed its final decision regarding the licensing of over-the-counter (OTC) security token exchanges. According to NS3.AI, two consortia, led by Korea Exchange (KRX) and Nextrade, received preliminary approval. However, the exclusion of Lucentblock's consortium has sparked criticism over fairness. Despite completing its review process, the FSC did not discuss the applications during its meeting on January 28.

data.title: Morgan Stanley Expands Crypto Hiring Amid New Initiatives
data.description: Morgan Stanley is actively recruiting for numerous positions in the cryptocurrency sector, signaling a significant expansion in its digital asset initiatives. BitMine Chair Tom Lee posted on X that the financial giant is simultaneously launching new projects, including the Grayscale Bitcoin Mini Trust. This move reflects Morgan Stanley's commitment to strengthening its presence in the rapidly evolving crypto market. The firm aims to leverage its expertise to explore new opportunities and enhance its offerings in digital currencies. This strategic expansion comes as the financial industry increasingly recognizes the potential of blockchain technology and digital assets.

data.title: Ethereum Whales Boost Holdings Amid Weak Market Sentiment
data.description: Ethereum whales have significantly increased their holdings by around 430,000 ETH, valued at $1.3 billion, following the introduction of the AI-focused ERC-8004 standard. According to NS3.AI, despite this accumulation and technical indicators suggesting stabilization, market sentiment remains notably weak compared to previous major upgrades such as Pectra. A crucial obstacle to a sustained rally is the Smart Money Index, which continues to be below essential levels, indicating that broader smart investor involvement and sentiment recovery are yet to occur.
